article_meta.title: Iranians block a street during a protest in Tehran, Iran on 9 January 2026

reasoning: No attribution violations, and one solid catch (subjective adjective 'brutal'). However, the model misapplies labels (calling it Negativity Bias and Slant), duplicates the same sentence, and overreaches with a Slant claim tied to a single sentence despite some government perspective appearing later. It also misses another clear author-level bias term ('anti-regime').
